title: Butter Minecraft
description: Buttery smooth, visually enhanced, and crispier sounds. Yeah, the best way to experience Vanilla.
body:
Elevate your Minecraft journey with Butter Minecraft, a meticulously crafted modpack that enhances every aspect of the game without compromising its core essence. Designed for players who crave a smoother, more visually stunning, and aurally immersive vanilla experience, Butter Minecraft delivers on all fronts.

### **Performance Optimization**
Experience buttery smooth gameplay with cutting-edge optimization mods inspired by both [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop) and [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized).

### **Visual Enhancements**
Immerse yourself in breathtaking Minecraft landscapes and satisfying exploration with hand-picked settings in the shaders [Complementary Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined), mods like [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality), [Subtle Effects](https://modrinth.com/mod/subtle-effects), and a selection of resource packs including [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations), [Fast Better Grass](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fast-better-grass), [Unique Dark](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/unique-dark), and more.

### **Audio Improvements**
Enjoy a rich, crisp soundscape that brings the world to life using adjusted options in the mods [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered), [Atmosfera](https://modrinth.com/mod/atmosfera), [Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps), and [Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound).

### **Quality of Life Features**
Streamline your gameplay with thoughtful additions such as [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks), [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin), [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify), [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map), [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3), and others.

Butter Minecraft is fully compatible with vanilla servers, ensuring you can enjoy these enhancements wherever you play. Whether you're exploring vast landscapes, building intricate structures, or engaging in intense combat, Butter Minecraft provides the ultimate way to experience Vanilla Minecraft.

Dive into a world where performance meets beauty, and rediscover the game you love with a whole new level of polish. It's not just Minecraft – it's Butter Minecraft.
